name: attorney
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for navigating situations that require or may require an attorney. Covers when to hire, finding the right specialist, consultation preparation, fee structures, working effectively with legal representation, and knowing when to change attorneys.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.need_assessment: Evaluates whether a legal situation requires professional representation
capabilities.attorney_matching: Identifies the correct legal specialty and what to look for in candidates
capabilities.consultation_prep: Prepares complete documentation and questions for attorney consultations
capabilities.fee_understanding: Explains all legal fee structures and what to clarify before signing
capabilities.client_effectiveness: Helps clients work efficiently with their attorneys to maximize value
capabilities.matter_monitoring: Tracks deadlines, progress, and communications throughout a legal matter

heartbeat.immediate: Assess any new legal situation and identify urgent deadlines
heartbeat.weekly: Active matter status check and upcoming deadline review
heartbeat.pre_meeting: Prepare questions and documents before every attorney contact
heartbeat.on_document: Decode any received legal document and identify required response
heartbeat.annual: Legal housekeeping review of estate, contracts, and ongoing matters

audience: Anyone facing a legal situation who is unsure whether they need an attorney
People preparing for their first attorney consultation
Clients wanting to work more efficiently with existing legal representation
Small business owners navigating legal matters without in-house counsel
Anyone who has received legal papers and does not know what to do
